body.title: Decide migrate-or-delete for lab/claudecode/archive seed scripts
body.result: Decision: exempt archive/ from audit (don't delete, don't migrate). README protects rebuild capability. Added 'archive' to EXCLUDED_PARTS in audit_logging.py. Files scanned: 458→418, callsites: 2522→2388.
body.description:
Archive directory `lab/claudecode/archive/` has ~120 print() callsites across ~40 archived seed scripts (audit found in 2026-04-29 logging audit, see lab/claudecode/reports/logging_audit_20260429-211639.md). These are old seeding scripts already moved to archive/. Decision: delete (already archived means unused), migrate to get_logger() (preserve runnable history), or leave as-is + add archive/ to audit exemption list.

**Affected files:** lab/claudecode/archive/seed_*.py + lab/claudecode/archive/local_pool.py.
**Design rules:** none apply (archive policy decision).
**Scope boundary:** in scope: pick policy + apply (delete OR exempt from audit OR migrate). Out of scope: actual seed-script content review.
**Test plan:** if delete chosen, re-run audit_logging.py and confirm archive/ no longer in punch list. If exempt chosen, add to EXCLUDED_PARTS and confirm. No new tests needed.
